paraphraser.0.0: Write an app to generate summaries of papers. It should have a button for the user to input the paper that they would like to summarise, an API call to Claude to generate the summary and an input field for the user to ask questions about the final summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.25: Construct an application to produce summaries of academic papers. It should contain a button for the user to input the paper they want to have summarised, an API call to Claude to generate the summary, and an input area for the user to ask questions regarding the summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.6: Create an app designed to produce summaries of research papers. The app must include a button enabling the user to upload the paper for summarization, an API call to Claude to create the summary, and an input box for users to pose questions concerning the final summarised paper.
paraphraser.0.9: Design an application whose purpose is the creation of short paper versions. The key feature will be some means whereby papers can get supplied to some AI API (Claude), the ultimate intent of which is its reduction into a summarized form for the user. Finally, let there be available functionality by which a user can question this derived form.

0.0:
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import requests

def generate_summary():
    paper_text = paper_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    prompt = f"Summarize the following paper in a concise and informative way: {paper_text}"
    response = requests.post("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/chat", json={"prompt": prompt, "model": "claude-v1"}, headers={"Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"})
    summary = response.json()["choices"][0]["text"]
    summary_label.config(text=summary)

def ask_question():
    question = question_input.get()
    prompt = f"Given the summary: {summary_label.cget('text')}, answer the following question: {question}"
    response = requests.post("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/chat", json={"prompt": prompt, "model": "claude-v1"}, headers={"Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"})
    answer = response.json()["choices"][0]["text"]
    answer_label.config(text=answer)

root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Paper Summarizer")

paper_label = ttk.Label(root, text="Enter the paper you want to summarize:")
paper_label.pack()

paper_input = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=50)
paper_input.pack()

summarize_button = ttk.Button(root, text="Summarize", command=generate_summary)
summarize_button.pack()

summary_label = ttk.Label(root, text="")
summary_label.pack()

question_label = ttk.Label(root, text="Ask a question about the summary:")
question_label.pack()

question_input = ttk.Entry(root)
question_input.pack()

ask_button = ttk.Button(root, text="Ask", command=ask_question)
ask_button.pack()

answer_label = ttk.Label(root, text="")
answer_label.pack()

root.mainloop()

from flask import Flask, render_template, request
import openai

app = Flask(__name__)

# Set up OpenAI API
openai.api_key = "your_openai_api_key"

@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def index():
    if request.method == 'POST':
        paper_text = request.form['paper_text']
        summary = generate_summary(paper_text)
        question = request.form['question']
        answer = answer_question(summary, question)
        return render_template('index.html', summary=summary, answer=answer)
    return render_template('index.html')

def generate_summary(paper_text):
    prompt = f"Summarize the following paper:\n\n{paper_text}"
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=prompt,
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.7,
    )
    summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return summary

def answer_question(summary, question):
    prompt = f"Answer the following question based on the summary:\n\nSummary: {summary}\n\nQuestion: {question}"
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=prompt,
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.7,
    )
    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return answer

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)

import requests
import tkinter as tk

def summarize_paper():
    paper_text = paper_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    response = requests.post(
        "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/chat",
        headers={
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
        },
        json={
            "model": "gpt-3.5-turbo",
            "messages": [
                {"role": "user", "content": f"Summarize the following paper: {paper_text}"}
            ]
        }
    )
    summary = response.json()["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
    summary_text.delete("1.0", "end")
    summary_text.insert("1.0", summary)

def ask_question():
    question = question_input.get()
    response = requests.post(
        "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/chat",
        headers={
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
        },
        json={
            "model": "gpt-3.5-turbo",
            "messages": [
                {"role": "user", "content": f"Answer the following question about the summarized paper: {question}"}
            ]
        }
    )
    answer = response.json()["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]
    answer_text.delete("1.0", "end")
    answer_text.insert("1.0", answer)

root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Paper Summarizer")

paper_label = tk.Label(root, text="Paper Text:")
paper_label.pack()

paper_input = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=50)
paper_input.pack()

summarize_button = tk.Button(root, text="Summarize", command=summarize_paper)
summarize_button.pack()

summary_label = tk.Label(root, text="Summary:")
summary_label.pack()

summary_text = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=50)
summary_text.pack()

question_label = tk.Label(root, text="Question:")
question_label.pack()

question_input = tk.Entry(root)
question_input.pack()

ask_button = tk.Button(root, text="Ask", command=ask_question)
ask_button.pack()

answer_label = tk.Label(root, text="Answer:")
answer_label.pack()

answer_text = tk.Text(root, height=5, width=50)
answer_text.pack()

root.mainloop()

from flask import Flask, render_template, request
import openai

app = Flask(__name__)

# Set up the OpenAI API
openai.api_key = "YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"

@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def index():
    if request.method == 'POST':
        # Get the paper text from the user input
        paper_text = request.form['paper_text']

        # Generate the summary using the OpenAI API
        response = openai.Completion.create(
            engine="text-davinci-002",
            prompt=f"Summarize the following paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
            max_tokens=1024,
            n=1,
            stop=None,
            temperature=0.7,
        )

        summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()

        # Get the user's question about the summary
        question = request.form['question']

        # Use the OpenAI API to answer the question
        response = openai.Completion.create(
            engine="text-davinci-002",
            prompt=f"Question: {question}\nSummary: {summary}",
            max_tokens=1024,
            n=1,
            stop=None,
            temperature=0.7,
        )

        answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()

        return render_template('index.html', summary=summary, answer=answer)

    return render_template('index.html')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)

import tkinter as tk
import requests

def summarize_paper():
    paper_text = paper_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    summary_response = requests.post(
        "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/generate",
        headers={
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
        },
        json={
            "prompt": f"Please provide a concise summary of the following academic paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
            "max_tokens": 500,
            "temperature": 0.7,
            "top_p": 0.9,
            "model": "claude-v1"
        }
    )
    summary = summary_response.json()["result"]
    summary_output.delete("1.0", "end")
    summary_output.insert("1.0", summary)

def ask_question():
    question = question_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    qa_response = requests.post(
        "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/generate",
        headers={
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
        },
        json={
            "prompt": f"Based on the summary of the academic paper, please answer the following question: {question}",
            "max_tokens": 500,
            "temperature": 0.7,
            "top_p": 0.9,
            "model": "claude-v1"
        }
    )
    answer = qa_response.json()["result"]
    answer_output.delete("1.0", "end")
    answer_output.insert("1.0", answer)

root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Academic Paper Summarizer")

paper_input = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=80)
paper_input.grid(row=0, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

summarize_button = tk.Button(root, text="Summarize Paper", command=summarize_paper)
summarize_button.grid(row=1, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

summary_output = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=80)
summary_output.grid(row=2, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

question_input = tk.Text(root, height=2, width=80)
question_input.grid(row=3, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

ask_button = tk.Button(root, text="Ask Question", command=ask_question)
ask_button.grid(row=4, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

answer_output = tk.Text(root, height=5, width=80)
answer_output.grid(row=5, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import requests

def summarize_paper():
    paper_text = paper_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
    }
    data = {
        "model": "text-davinci-002",
        "prompt": f"Summarize the following academic paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
        "max_tokens": 1024,
        "n": 1,
        "stop": None,
        "temperature": 0.5,
    }
    response = requests.post("https://api.openai.com/v1/completions", headers=headers, json=data)
    summary = response.json()["choices"][0]["text"]
    summary_output.delete("1.0", "end")
    summary_output.insert("1.0", summary)

def ask_question():
    paper_text = paper_input.get("1.0", "end-1c")
    question = question_input.get()
    headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
    }
    data = {
        "model": "text-davinci-002",
        "prompt": f"Answer the following question about the academic paper:\n\nQuestion: {question}\nPaper: {paper_text}",
        "max_tokens": 1024,
        "n": 1,
        "stop": None,
        "temperature": 0.5,
    }
    response = requests.post("https://api.openai.com/v1/completions", headers=headers, json=data)
    answer = response.json()["choices"][0]["text"]
    answer_output.delete("1.0", "end")
    answer_output.insert("1.0", answer)

root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Academic Paper Summarizer")

paper_label = ttk.Label(root, text="Enter the academic paper:")
paper_label.grid(row=0, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)

paper_input = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=80)

            }

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import requests

def upload_paper():
    file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
    with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
        text = f.read()
    summary = get_summary(text)
    summary_text.delete('1.0', tk.END)
    summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

def get_summary(text):
    url = 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/complete'
    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE'}
    data = {
        'prompt': f'Summarize the following text in a concise and informative manner:\n\n{text}',
        'max_tokens': 500,
        'temperature': 0.7,
        'top_p': 0.95,
        'frequency_penalty': 0.0,
        'presence_penalty': 0.0,
        'stop_sequences': ['\n\n']
    }
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)
    return response.json()['choices'][0]['text']

def ask_question():
    question = question_entry.get()
    text = summary_text.get('1.0', tk.END)
    answer = get_answer(question, text)
    answer_text.delete('1.0', tk.END)
    answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

def get_answer(question, text):
    url = 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/complete'
    headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY_HERE'}
    data = {
        'prompt': f'Answer the following question based on the given text:\nQuestion: {question}\nText: {text}',
        'max_tokens': 300,
        'temperature': 0.7,
        'top_p': 0.95,
        'frequency_penalty': 0.0,
        'presence_penalty': 0.0,
        'stop_sequences': ['\n\n']
    }
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=data)
    return response.json()['choices'][0]['text']

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import openai

# Set up the OpenAI API
openai.api_key = "your_api_key_here"

# Define the function to create the summary
def summarize_paper():
    # Open the file dialog to select the research paper
    file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
    
    # Read the contents of the file
    with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
        paper_text = file.read()
    
    # Use the OpenAI API to generate a summary
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Summarize the following research paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    
    summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    
    # Display the summary in the app
    summary_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
    summary_text.insert(tk.END, summary)

# Define the function to handle user questions
def answer_question():
    # Get the user's question from the input box
    question = question_input.get()
    
    # Use the OpenAI API to generate an answer
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Answer the following question about the research paper:\n\n{question}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    
    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    
    # Display the answer in the app
    answer_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
    answer_text.insert(tk.END, answer)

# Create the main window
root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Research Paper Summarizer")

# Create the upload button
upload_button = tk.Button(root, text="Upload Paper", command=summarize_paper)
upload_button.pack(pady=10)

# Create the summary text box
summary_text = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=80)
summary_text.pack(pady=10)

# Create the question input box and button
question_label = tk.Label(root, text="Ask a question:")
question_label.pack(pady=5)

question_input = tk.Entry(root)
question_input.pack(pady=5)

question_button = tk.Button(root, text="Answer Question", command=answer_question)
question_button.pack(pady=5)

# Create the answer text box
answer_text = tk.Text(root, height=5, width=80)
answer_text.pack(pady=10)

# Start the main event loop
root.mainloop()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog
import openai

# Set up the OpenAI API
openai.api_key = "your_api_key"

# Define the summarization function
def summarize_paper():
    # Open the file dialog to select the research paper
    file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename()
    
    # Read the contents of the paper
    with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
        paper_text = file.read()
    
    # Call the OpenAI API to generate the summary
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Summarize the following research paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    
    # Extract the summary from the API response
    summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    
    # Display the summary in the output box
    output_box.delete(1.0, tk.END)
    output_box.insert(tk.END, summary)

# Define the question-answering function
def answer_question():
    # Get the user's question from the input box
    question = question_box.get("1.0", tk.END).strip()
    
    # Call the OpenAI API to generate the answer
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Answer the following question based on the research paper summary:\n\nQuestion: {question}\nAnswer:",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    
    # Extract the answer from the API response
    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    
    # Display the answer in the output box
    output_box.delete(1.0, tk.END)
    output_box.insert(tk.END, answer)

# Create the main window
root = tk.Tk()
root.title("Research Paper Summarizer")

# Create the upload button
upload_button = tk.Button(root, text="Upload Paper", command=summarize_paper)
upload_button.pack(pady=10)

output_box = tk.Text(root, height=10, width=80)

question_box.pack(pady=10)

# Create the question-answering button
question_button = tk.Button(root, text="Answer Question", command=answer_question)
question_button.pack(pady=10)

# Start the main event loop
root.mainloop()

import streamlit as st
from langchain.llms import Anthropic
from langchain.agents import initialize_agent, Tool
from langchain.agents.agent_toolkits import create_csv_agent
import os

# Set up Anthropic API key
os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"] = "your_api_key"

# Initialize Anthropic LLM
llm = Anthropic(temperature=0.7)

# Initialize agent
tools = [
    Tool(
        name="Summarize Research Paper",
        func=lambda text: llm.call_as_json("Summarize the following research paper:\n\n" + text)
    ),
    Tool(
        name="Answer Questions",
        func=lambda question, text: llm.call_as_json("Answer the following question about the given text:\n\nQuestion: " + question + "\n\nText: " + text)
    )
]
agent = initialize_agent(tools, llm, agent="zero-shot-react-description", verbose=True)

# Streamlit app
st.title("Research Paper Summarizer")

# File upload
uploaded_file = st.file_uploader("Upload a research paper", type=["pdf"])

if uploaded_file is not None:
    # Read the file
    paper_text = uploaded_file.read().decode("utf-8")

    # Summarize the paper
    summary = agent.run("Summarize the following research paper:\n\n" + paper_text)
    st.write("Summary:")
    st.write(summary)

    # Answer questions
    question = st.text_input("Ask a question about the paper")
    if question:
        answer = agent.run("Answer the following question about the given text:\n\nQuestion: " + question + "\n\nText: " + paper_text)
        st.write("Answer:")
        st.write(answer)

import os
import openai
from flask import Flask, request, render_template

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def index():
    if request.method == 'POST':
        paper_file = request.files['paper_file']
        paper_text = paper_file.read().decode('utf-8')
        
        openai.api_key = os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY']
        response = openai.Completion.create(
            engine='text-davinci-002',
            prompt=f'Summarize the following research paper:\n\n{paper_text}\n\nSummary:',
            max_tokens=1024,
            n=1,
            stop=None,
            temperature=0.5,
        )
        
        summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
        
        question = request.form['question']
        response = openai.Completion.create(
            engine='text-davinci-002',
            prompt=f'Answer the following question about the research paper:\n\nQuestion: {question}\n\nAnswer:',
            max_tokens=1024,
            n=1,
            stop=None,
            temperature=0.5,
        )
        
        answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
        
        return render_template('index.html', summary=summary, answer=answer)
    
    return render_template('index.html')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)

# Define a function to summarize a paper
def summarize_paper(paper_text):
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Summarize the following paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,

        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return answer

import os
import openai

# Set up OpenAI API
openai.api_key = os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"]

# Function to summarize a paper
def summarize_paper(paper_text):
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Summarize the following paper:\n\n{paper_text}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    return response.choices[0].text.strip()

# Function to answer questions about the summary
def answer_question(summary, question):
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Given the following summary:\n\n{summary}\n\nAnswer the question: {question}",
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    return response.choices[0].text.strip()

# Example usage

question = "What is the main topic of the paper?"
answer = answer_question(summary, question)

import openai
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import filedialog

# Initialize the OpenAI API
openai.api_key = "your_api_key_here"

# Define the function to summarize a paper
def summarize_paper(paper_text):
    prompt = f"Summarize the following paper:\n\n{paper_text}"
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=prompt,
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return summary

# Define the function to ask questions about the summary
def ask_questions(summary, question):
    prompt = f"Question: {question}\nSummary: {summary}"
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=prompt,
        max_tokens=1024,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )
    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return answer

# Define the GUI
class PaperSummarizerApp(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title("Paper Summarizer")
        self.geometry("600x400")

        # Create the file upload button
        self.upload_button = tk.Button(self, text="Upload Paper", command=self.upload_paper)
        self.upload_button.pack(pady=20)

        # Create the summary display area
        self.summary_label = tk.Label(self, text="", wraplength=500)
        self.summary_label.pack(pady=20)

        # Create the question input and answer display area
        self.question_entry = tk.Entry(self)
        self.question_entry.pack(pady=10)
        self.question_button = tk.Button(self, text="Ask Question", command=self.ask_question)
        self.question_button.pack(pady=10)
        self.answer_label = tk.Label(self, text="", wraplength=500)
        self.answer_label.pack(pady=20)

    def upload_paper(self):
        file_path = filedialog.askopenfilename(filetypes=[("Text Files", "*.txt")])
        if file_path:
            with open(file_path, "r") as file:
                paper_text = file.read()
            summary = summarize_paper(paper_text)
            self.summary_label.configure(text=summary)

    def ask_question(self):
        question = self.question_entry.get()
        summary = self.summary_label.cget("text")
        answer = ask_questions(summary, question)
        self.answer_label.configure(text=answer)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = PaperSummarizerApp()
    app.mainloop()

import os
import openai

# Set up OpenAI API credentials
openai.api_key = "your_api_key_here"

def summarize_text(text):
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Summarize the following text:\n\n{text}",
        max_tokens=150,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )

    summary = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return summary

def question_summary(summary, question):
    response = openai.Completion.create(
        engine="text-davinci-002",
        prompt=f"Answer the following question based on the summary:\n\nSummary: {summary}\n\nQuestion: {question}",
        max_tokens=100,
        n=1,
        stop=None,
        temperature=0.5,
    )

    answer = response.choices[0].text.strip()
    return answer

def main():
    print("Welcome to the Paper Summarizer!")

    while True:
        print("\nOptions:")
        print("1. Summarize a paper")
        print("2. Question a summary")
        print("3. Exit")

        choice = input("Enter your choice (1-3): ")

        if choice == "1":
            paper_text = input("Enter the text of the paper: ")
            summary = summarize_text(paper_text)
            print("\nSummary:")
            print(summary)
        elif choice == "2":
            summary = input("Enter the summary: ")
            question = input("Enter your question: ")
            answer = question_summary(summary, question)
            print("\nAnswer:")
            print(answer)
        elif choice == "3":
            print("Goodbye!")
            break
        else:
            print("Invalid choice. Please try again.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
